title: Mezhuveli Temple
tagline: Mezhuveli Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mezhuveli Anandabhootheshawaram Temple is a famous Lord Shiva Temple situated at the heart of Mezhuveli village in Pathanamthitta District.
overview.description: Mezhuveli Anandabhootheshawaram Temple is a famous Lord Shiva Temple situated at the heart of Mezhuveli village in Pathanamthitta District. This temple was built by the villagers under the leadership of famous social reformer and poet Sri. Muloor S.Padmanabha Panicker and consecrated by Sree Narayana Guru. This century-old temple was built on a place called 'Tholekavu' which was surrounded by a small hill called 'Meenchirakkal Hill' on the southern side, 'Ambottimodi' also called 'Kailasam' on the east, a beautiful stream flowing on the western side near "Pottanmala" and at the north side "Pad

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mezhuveli
topPlaces.description: Mezhuveli is a village in Kerala, India, situated between the holy rivers of Pamba and Achankovil. It is located 16 kilometers south-west of Pathanamthitta and 12 kilometers east of Chengannur.

topPlaces.name: Perumkunnil Junction
topPlaces.description: Perumkunnil Junction (also known as VazhanasalaMukk) is a small village in Pathanamthitta district, Travancore region, Kerala, India. It is on the route between Aranmula (famous for its boat races) and Pathanamthitta (en route to the holy pilgrimage destination of Sabarimala).

topPlaces.name: Kidangannoor
topPlaces.description: Kidangannoor is a town in the extreme west end of Pathanamthitta district in the state of Kerala, India. It is on the route between Aranmula (famous for its boat races) and Pandalam.

topPlaces.name: Elavumthitta
topPlaces.description: Elavumthitta (also Elavinthitta, Elavanthitta) is a town (located near to the border of Alappuzha and Pathanamthitta district) in Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India. The majority of its inhabitants are from Hindu and Christian backgrounds.

topPlaces.name: Elanthoor
topPlaces.description: Elanthoor (Malayalam: [ilɐn̪d̪uːr]) is a village in Pathanamthitta district of the southern state of Kerala, India. Situated halfway between Kozhencherry and Pathanamthitta, including Elanthoor Several regions present-day Pathanamthitta and Alappuzha were originally part of the Kollam district were later added to the newly formed Pathanamthitta district upon its creation on 1 November 1982, the area historically was part of the Kingdom of Travancore and Venadu.

topPlaces.name: Mallappuzhassery
topPlaces.description: Mallappuzhassery is a village situated in Kozhencherry taluk of Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. Its border starts in the middle of the temple grounds running north–south: the eastern part is Mallappuzhassery and the western part is Edasserimala.

topPlaces.name: Kallara
topPlaces.description: Kallara is a small town in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. Kottayam is located 10 km (6.2 mi) to the south.

topPlaces.name: Mulakuzha
topPlaces.description: Mulakuzha or മുളക്കുഴ is a village in Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. Mulakuzha is located in Chengannur tehsil, and residents are mostly artisans and farmers.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mezhuveli Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mezhuveli Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mezhuveli Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (93 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (88 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mezhuveli Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mezhuveli Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mezhuveli Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mezhuveli Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mezhuveli Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mezhuveli, Perumkunnil Junction, Kidangannoor, Elavumthitta, Elanthoor.
